meta.title: Agustín Molé — Full Stack Product Engineer
meta.description: Full Stack Product Engineer specializing in SaaS, AI-powered systems, and modern web applications. Building end-to-end products with React, Next.js, Node.js, and more.

hero.subtitle: I build complete SaaS products and AI-powered systems end-to-end — from scalable backends and clean APIs to modern, high-quality frontend interfaces.

about.label: About
about.bio1: I'm Agustín, a Full Stack Product Engineer from Argentina. I specialize in building complete web applications and SaaS products — from the database design to the user interface — with a focus on clean architecture, real-world scalability, and great user experience.
about.bio2: I work across the entire product stack: REST APIs with Node.js and Django, modern frontends with React and Next.js, mobile apps with React Native, and increasingly, AI-powered features using LLMs and automation agents.
about.bio3: I'm currently pursuing a degree in Programming at UTN while simultaneously building real-world products and expanding my skills in AI tooling and modern DevOps practices.

specialties.title: SaaS Builder
specialties.description: Design and build complete SaaS products from architecture to deployment, covering backend, frontend, auth, and payments.

specialties.title: Full Stack Engineering
specialties.description: End-to-end development across the entire stack: REST APIs, databases, state management, and modern UI.

specialties.title: AI-Assisted Development
specialties.description: Integrate LLMs and AI agents into real products. Build automation workflows and intelligent features with modern AI tools.

specialties.title: Product Mindset
specialties.description: Ship features that matter. I think from the user's perspective and build systems that solve real problems at scale.

projects.label: Projects
projects.heading: Products I've built
projects.subtitle: End-to-end systems built with production-quality standards — from architecture to deployment.

items.title: GoTicket — Event Management SaaS
items.description: Complete SaaS platform for event management and ticket sales with admin panel, roles, and payment processing.

items.title: TaskFlow — Collaborative Task Manager
items.description: Collaborative platform for project and task management with statuses, comments, and multiple collaborators.

items.title: SecureGate — Private Security Platform
items.description: Security system for gated communities with facial biometric authentication, mobile app, and real-time management.

items.title: JobSearchAgent — AI Job Application System
items.description: AI agent for job search and management, capable of assisting in applications through automatic response generation, interview preparation, vacancy analysis, and adaptive Q&A creation for each opportunity.

items.title: StoreOS — Store Management SaaS
items.description: Business management system for stores with dashboard, inventory, point of sale, and complete administrative tools.

items.title: IoT Monitoring Platform — Real-Time Monitoring Platform
items.description: End-to-end IoT monitoring platform that ingests telemetry from physical devices via MQTT, detects anomalies in real time, and visualizes them on a reactive dashboard via WebSockets.
features: Reactive dashboard with temperature history and alerts

items.title: Obras Particulares — Municipal Works Management Platform
items.description: Municipal works manager — blueprints, permits, and technical review with AI for the municipality of Godoy Cruz.
features: Permit management with SOAP municipal integration
Technical review with observations and comments
Automatic regulatory compliance analysis with AI

skills.subtitle: A modern, production-oriented skillset built across full stack development, mobile, and AI tooling.

contact.label: Contact
contact.heading: Let's work together
contact.subtitle: Open to new opportunities, freelance projects, and interesting collaborations. Send me a message and I'll get back to you quickly.
contact.available_detail: I'm currently open to full-time positions, freelance contracts, and interesting side projects. Response time: usually within 24 hours.
